author: youzhixiaomutou
description: Maintain a Karpathy-style LLM Wiki with AI-assisted ingest, query, lint, and previewed file changes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: youzhixiaomutou
manifest.description: Maintain a Karpathy-style LLM Wiki with AI-assisted ingest, query, lint, and previewed file changes.
manifest.name: Auto LLM Wiki

name: Auto LLM Wiki

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- **Fix**: the ribbon icon and the **Query Auto LLM Wiki** command now *toggle* the chat panel — clicking again closes it (previously it could only be opened/focused). Conversations persist, so reopening restores the active one.
- **Faster startup**: the heavy document parsers (Word / Excel / PowerPoint / RTF / OpenXML) load lazily — only when a matching source file is ingested — instead of on every plugin load.
- Chat context now reads wiki pages through Obsidian's cached reader and reads the selected pages concurrently; OpenXML change-detection hashing runs with bounded concurrency.
- Internal cleanup: removed dead query-modal code and unused i18n strings.

## Verification
- npm test (261 passing)
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- New **chat panel**: replaces the one-shot query modal with a dedicated side panel — multi-turn conversations grounded in your wiki (index-first retrieval), Markdown-rendered replies you can copy or **Save to wiki** through the reviewed change plan.
- **Multiple conversations** that coexist and persist across restarts: a history list to switch, rename, and delete (with a confirmation prompt); **New chat** starts a fresh one without discarding the current.
- Sending is per-conversation: start or use another chat while one is still replying — each reply lands back in its own conversation.
- Grounding/prompt improvements: retrieval uses the recent conversation (not just the last message), wiki context rides in the system message (clean user/assistant turns), and the index/log are excluded from the pages sent to the model.
- Persistence hardening: stored conversations are validated/sanitized, an interrupted trailing turn is dropped on load, and the stored conversation count is capped.
- **Requires Obsidian 1.7.2+** (uses the current `revealLeaf` API). READMEs (en + zh) now include a chat panel preview image.

## Verification
- npm test (265 passing)
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Query now files worthwhile answers back into the wiki as a new/updated page and records the query in the log, so explorations compound in the knowledge base.
- New reviewed **lint** command reconciles the wiki against the current raw sources: it treats the wiki as a synthesis distilled from many sources, prefers revising a page over deleting it, and prunes only truly orphaned pages (whose raw source was removed). Findings appear in the preview summary — no report page is written.
- Change-plan parsing is now robust to chatty replies: fenced JSON, prose containing stray braces, and an example/schema object emitted before the real plan are all handled (whole-reply JSON is used when present).
- Delete operations are always reviewed (never auto-applied), are confined to the lint flow (ingest/query no longer propose deletions), cannot remove the index or log, and reject deleting a missing file or a same-path delete+write in one plan.
- Raw scanning isolates per-file failures and runs with bounded concurrency: one unreadable file (or a failed OCR call) no longer aborts the whole batch — the rest still ingest and skipped files are reported.
- Content fingerprints widened to 64-bit; a legacy 8-char fingerprint upgrades in place without re-ingesting the file.
- Settings cleanup (unified the numeric second-based controls; dropped a removed legacy key) and distinct badge styles for delete/prepend operations in the preview.

## Verification
- npm test (225 passing)
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Query now uses Karpathy-style index-first retrieval: read the index, and for larger wikis ask the model which pages are relevant, then answer from only those (instead of dumping an arbitrary first-20). Caps prompt size and improves relevance.
- Change plans now apply atomically: the whole plan is validated first (rejecting create-over-existing and folder-occupied paths) and rolled back on failure, so the vault is never left half-written.
- Auto ingest now polls the raw folder on a configurable interval (default 15s, 0 disables) so files changed outside Obsidian (e.g. dragged in) are caught without a restart; scans stay silent when nothing changed.
- The ingest command is renamed to "Ingest changed raw files" to match its behavior.

## Verification
- npm test (189 passing)
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Retry transient endpoint errors (network, 429, 5xx) with exponential backoff and honor `Retry-After`; non-retryable 4xx are not retried.
- Add a request timeout (default 900s, configurable in settings) so slow local or reasoning models no longer hang indefinitely; a timeout is not retried to avoid concurrent duplicate requests.
- Detect truncated completions via `finish_reason: "length"` and surface a clear error; OCR keeps partial transcription instead of aborting the batch.
- Skip re-reading/re-hashing unchanged raw files via an mtime+size fast-path, re-stamping drifted/legacy entries so the skip engages for existing vaults.
- Fix production wiring so `requestUrl` returns 4xx/5xx status (throw:false) and status-based retry and structured errors actually apply.
- Detect the UI language via `localStorage` instead of `getLanguage()` to stay within the declared minAppVersion, and use `Setting.setHeading()` for the settings title.
- Document the new setting and reliability behavior (English + Simplified Chinese).

## Verification
- npm test (172 passing)
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Add stable OpenXML content fingerprints for `.docx`, `.xlsx`, and `.pptx` raw sources.
- Ignore Office `docProps/*` metadata-only changes so reopening files does not trigger repeated auto ingest or OCR.
- Keep PDF/images/legacy Office on pre-parse binary hashes and preserve text/HTML/RTF extracted-content hashes.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build
- Bundle scan confirmed no dynamic script element creation in main.js

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Add optional automatic raw-file ingest for supported file creations and modifications, with debounce and direct application of validated model changes.
- Switch wiki log entries to newest-first via the new prepend operation and update README/settings copy.
- Remove bundled dynamic script element creation from dependency scheduler polyfills for Obsidian plugin review compliance.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build
- Bundle scan confirmed no dynamic script element creation in main.js

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Expand raw source ingestion to support text/code files, HTML, Office documents, spreadsheets, presentations, RTF, PDF, and image OCR inputs.
- Add legacy Office support for DOC, XLS, and PPT, plus GIF OCR support.
- Document all supported formats and OCR behavior in English and Chinese README files.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Follow Obsidian's configured language for plugin UI text, notices, settings, review modal, and predictable errors.
- Add output-language guidance to LLM prompts while keeping JSON schemas stable.
- Publish updated plugin bundle for v0.1.4.

## Test plan
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Add raw PDF ingest support, including text-layer extraction and vision OCR fallback for scanned/image PDFs.
- Add raw scan diagnostics and PDF ingest progress notices.
- Add a settings-page OpenAI connection test button using HTTP 2xx validation.
- Update README documentation for v0.1.3 behavior.

## Test Plan
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Rename the plugin to Auto LLM Wiki for community submission.
- Update the plugin ID and package name to auto-llm-wiki.
- Rebuild release assets with the renamed metadata.

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Align plugin metadata with Obsidian community submission requirements.
- Clarify privacy disclosures for API key storage and configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
- Publish release assets for Obsidian Community review.

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description: Initial release of Obsidian LLM Wiki.
